PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?result

  ?result pv:hasCategory <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/prod-cat-Encoder> .
  ?result pv:price ?priceR .
  ?priceR pv:amount ?price .
  ?result pv:hasSupplier ?supplier .

generated:
PREFIX prod: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>
PREFIX prodInst: <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/>
PREFIX dbpedia: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?encoder ?encoderLabel ?supplier ?supplierLabel ?priceValue WHERE {
  ?encoder prod:hasCategory prodInst:prod-cat-Encoder .
  ?encoder prod:hasSupplier ?supplier .
  ?supplier prod:country ?country .
  FILTER(?country IN (dbpedia:France, dbpedia:Germany))
  ?encoder prod:price ?price .
  ?price prod:amount ?priceValue .
  OPTIONAL { ?encoder rdfs:label ?encoderLabel . }
  OPTIONAL { ?supplier rdfs:label ?supplierLabel . }
} ORDER BY ASC(xsd:decimal(?priceValue)) LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT ?result

  ?result pv:hasCategory <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/prod-cat-Potentiometer> .
  ?result pv:width_mm ?width_mm .
  ?result pv:depth_mm ?depth_mm .

}

PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?result
WHERE
{
  ?result pv:hasCategory <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/prod-cat-Coil> .
  ?result pv:width_mm ?width_mm .
  ?result pv:depth_mm ?depth_mm .
  ?result pv:height_mm ?height_mm .
  ?result pv:weight_g ?weight_g .
  BIND(?width_mm * ?depth_mm * ?height_mm / 1000000000 AS ?volume_m3)
  BIND(?weight_g / 1000 AS ?weight_kg)
  BIND(?weight_kg / ?volume_m3 AS ?density)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?density)
LIMIT 1

golden:
PREFIX prodi: <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/>
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

ASK
WHERE {
  { # all BOMs with parts from russia
    SELECT ?bom
    WHERE {
      ?bom pv:hasBomPart ?bomPart .
      ?bomPart pv:hasPart ?hw .
      ?hw pv:hasSupplier ?suppl .
      ?suppl pv:addressCountry ?country .
      FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(?country), LCASE("Russia")))
    }
  }

  # services eligible for parts associated with these BOMs?
  ?s a pv:Service .
  ?s pv:eligibleFor ?hw .
  ?bom pv:hasBomPart ?bomPart .
  ?bomPart pv:hasPart ?hw .
}

SELECT DISTINCT ?department ?departmentName (COUNT(*) AS ?numEmployees) WHERE {

PREFIX prod: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?supplier (ROUND(AVG(xsd:decimal(?amount))) AS ?averagePriceEUR)
WHERE {
  ?product prod:hasSupplier ?supplier .
  ?product prod:price ?priceEntity .
  ?priceEntity prod:currency "EUR" .
  ?priceEntity prod:amount ?amount .
}
GROUP BY ?supplier

    OPTIONAL { ?supplier <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/addressLocality> ?addressLocality } .

    OPTIONAL { ?supplier <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/addressCountryCode> ?addressCountryCode } .
  }

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?product ?compatibleProduct ?priceProduct ?priceCompatibleProduct ?priceDifference WHERE {
  ?product rdf:type/rdfs:subClassOf* <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/Product> .
  ?product <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/compatibleProduct> ?compatibleProduct .
  ?product <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/price> ?priceProductEntity .
  ?compatibleProduct <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/price> ?priceCompatibleEntity .
  ?priceProductEntity <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/amount> ?priceProduct .
  ?priceCompatibleEntity <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/amount> ?priceCompatibleProduct .
  BIND(?priceProduct - ?priceCompatibleProduct AS ?priceDifference)
}

golden:
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX prodi: <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/>
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT ?bom (COUNT(?part) AS ?partCount) (SUM(?qty) AS ?totalQty)
WHERE {
  ?bom a pv:BillOfMaterial ;
    pv:hasBomPart ?part .
  ?part pv:quantity ?qty_ .
  BIND(xsd:int(?qty_) AS ?qty)
}
GROUP BY ?bom
HAVING (SUM(?qty) > 600)
ORDER BY DESC(SUM(?qty))
generated:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?bom (COUNT(*) AS ?numberOfParts) (SUM(xsd:integer(?quantity)) AS ?totalQuantity)
WHERE {
  ?bom rdf:type/rdfs:subClassOf* <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/BillOfMaterial> .
  ?bom <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/hasBomPart> ?bomPart .
  ?bomPart <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/quantity> ?quantity .
}
GROUP BY ?bom
HAVING (SUM(xsd:integer(?quantity)) > 600)
ORDER BY DESC(?totalQuantity)

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?manager
       (COUNT(*) AS ?teamSize)
       (COUNT(*) AS ?sameDeptCount)
       ((COUNT(*)*1.0 / COUNT(*)) AS ?percentageSameDept)
WHERE {
  ?manager rdf:type/rdfs:subClassOf* <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/Manager> .
  ?employee <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/hasManager> ?manager .
  ?manager <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/memberOf> ?managerDept .
  ?employee <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/memberOf> ?employeeDept .
  
  OPTIONAL {
    FILTER(?managerDept = ?employeeDept)
    BIND(?employee AS ?employeeSameDept)
  }
}
GROUP BY ?manager

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX prod: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?bom (AVG(xsd:decimal(?amount)) AS ?avgUnitCost) WHERE {
  ?bom rdf:type/rdfs:subClassOf* prod:BillOfMaterial .
  ?bom prod:hasBomPart ?bomPart .
  ?bomPart prod:hasPart ?product .
  ?product rdf:type/rdfs:subClassOf* prod:Hardware .
  ?product prod:price ?price .
  ?price prod:amount ?amount .
}
GROUP BY ?bom
ORDER BY DESC(?avgUnitCost)
LIMIT 1

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?hardware ?id ?name ?width WHERE {
  ?hardware rdf:type/rdfs:subClassOf* <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/Hardware> .
  ?hardware <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/width_mm> ?width .
  ?hardware <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/id> ?id .
  ?hardware <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/name> ?name .
  FILTER (?width >= 80)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?width)
